narrative:
Fairborn 205 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,419 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
